responsibility: Backend-for-frontend and server-only authority: HTTP edge, GraphQL mount, application usecases, ports, driven adapters, and DB migrations. The only place token exchange, Keycloak SDK, DB/Redis access, migrations, and server observability live.
forbiddenContents: test fixtures shared with web app outside test-support
dependencyDirection: Depends inward on packages/domain, packages/runtime, packages/contracts, packages/platform, and packages/adapters. Never imports apps/web.
publicApi: Exposes only HTTP (REST/BFF + GraphQL) over the network; no TS package export surface.
tests: npm run test:platform-api (node:test, explicit file list); OpenAPI drift gate; architecture orchestrator.
architectureRule: Hexagonal core. Usecases depend on ports; adapters implement ports; server wires DI. No DB/Redis/Keycloak/token logic outside adapters. Typed platform-errors only; platform-logging only (no console).

responsibility: HTTP edge and request pipeline: routing, auth, forward-auth, resource authorization, tenant resolution, session, GraphQL mount, health, OTEL init, worker/webhook runtimes, DI composition.
dependencyDirection: Depends on usecases and ports; wires adapters via dependencies.ts. Inbound only from index.ts.
publicApi: Internal to platform-api; exposed as HTTP routes.
tests: Route/pipeline tests under test:platform-api; forward-auth and tenant-resolver covered explicitly.
architectureRule: Server-side tenant authority: org context derived server-side, never trusted from client. Permission gating before usecase invocation.

responsibility: Application services, one file per capability (auth, members, groups, organisation, audit, api-keys, rate-limits, quota, entitlements, features, search, events, notifications, observability, metering, history, secrets, provider-config, composed-providers, environment-registry, scheduled-jobs, capability-registry, clickthrough-services, idp-*, oidc-discovery, profile, platform-config, platform-services).
dependencyDirection: Depends on ports and packages/domain + packages/contracts. Never on adapters or server.
tests: Per-capability node:test in test:platform-api list.
architectureRule: Pure application logic over ports; all external effects via injected ports. Typed errors only.

responsibility: Interfaces (repositories, event-bus, billing-provider, routing-probe, registries) that the core depends on; the contract adapters must satisfy.
dependencyDirection: Depends only on packages/contracts and packages/domain types. Pure.
publicApi: Imported by usecases and implemented by adapters.
tests: Compile-time typing; exercised via usecase + adapter tests.
architectureRule: Dependency inversion boundary. No concrete dependency may appear here.

responsibility: Driven adapters implementing ports: postgres-*, redis-*, smtp/notification transports, openbao-secret-store, http-webhook-dispatcher, compose-environment-operation, readiness probes, tenant-secret crypto.
allowedContents: external SDK usage (pg, redis, nodemailer, openbao, http clients)
dependencyDirection: Depends on ports + packages/adapters + packages/platform. Wired by server/dependencies.ts. Not imported by usecases.
publicApi: Constructed in dependencies.ts; satisfies port interfaces.
tests: Adapter-level tests with real/in-memory backends under test:platform-api.
architectureRule: Only layer permitted to touch DB, Redis, Keycloak SDK, SMTP, secret stores. pino/console permitted only via platform-logging.

responsibility: Database lifecycle: migrate, seed, reset, and forward-only migrations.
forbiddenContents: destructive DROP SCHEMA without re-GRANT USAGE TO PUBLIC
dependencyDirection: Depends on adapters-postgres. Standalone from server runtime.
publicApi: Invoked via make db-migrate / db-shell / seed-demo.
tests: Migration application verified in compose smoke; checksum immutability enforced.
architectureRule: Committed migrations are checksum-immutable: add forward-only, never edit.

responsibility: React SPA (renamed from V1 react-enterprise-app). Routing, feature slices, app shell, client auth glue, MSW. Consumes server data only via the BFF.
dependencyDirection: Depends on packages/frontend (ui-design-system, graphql-browser-client), packages/contracts, packages/platform/errors. Never imports adapters or platform-api source.
tests: npm run test:frontend:run (vitest), MSW-backed; e2e Playwright suites.
architectureRule: BFF-only data access. Visual layer may be AI-regenerated; behaviours/queries/mutations/permissions/error-states/a11y/journeys are preserved from V1.

responsibility: Capability feature slices (one dir per capability), each owning its page, components, TanStack Query queries, mutations, Zod schema, and tests, following _template.
allowedContents: one dir per capability matching a BFF capability
forbiddenContents: cross-feature imports of another feature's internals
permission checks faked client-side as authority
dependencyDirection: Depends on packages/frontend and packages/contracts. Sibling features do not import each other.
publicApi: Each slice exposes its route-mounted page; internals private.
tests: Co-located __tests__ (vitest + MSW); journeys in e2e/.
architectureRule: Slice isolation. Feature-owned TanStack Query hooks over TypedDocumentNode. Contextual audit refresh after mutations; permission gating via RequirePermission.

responsibility: Pure shared types and schemas (admin, analytics, auth, graphql, ingestion, organisation) shared between BFF and clients with zero runtime dependencies.
dependencyDirection: Leaf layer; depended on by everything, depends on nothing internal.
publicApi: Named exports via each subpackage index.ts.
tests: Type-level + schema validation tests.
architectureRule: No package may import an adapter from contracts. Contracts import nothing inward.

responsibility: Pure domain logic (core, identity) with no IO and no framework dependencies.
dependencyDirection: Depends only on packages/contracts. Depended on by runtime, usecases.
tests: Unit tests under each package tests/.
architectureRule: No pino, no adapters, no side effects in domain.

responsibility: Framework-agnostic application runtimes exposing ports and orchestration logic (api, authorisation, config, email, graphql-api, i18n, notification, profile-configuration, queue, search, session, storage, runtime-context, worker).
dependencyDirection: Depends on packages/domain, packages/contracts, packages/platform. Implemented/wired by adapters at the app layer.
tests: Per-package unit tests.
architectureRule: Runtimes depend on ports, not adapters. i18n-runtime react.ts remains a bootstrap placeholder until ADR-0026 actions are Done.

responsibility: Reusable driven-adapter libraries wrapping external systems (brevo, clickhouse, graphql, ingestion, keycloak, loki, object-storage, opentelemetry, postgres, redis, sentry).
dependencyDirection: Depends on packages/runtime ports, packages/contracts, packages/platform. Never imported by domain/contracts/frontend.
tests: Integration tests against local/test backends.
architectureRule: Adapters are the only packages permitted to import external SDKs (Keycloak SDK confined to adapters/keycloak).

responsibility: Cross-cutting platform primitives: errors, logging, observability, access-control, security-auth, audit-events, observability-signals.
dependencyDirection: Low-level; depends only on packages/contracts. Imported broadly.
tests: Unit tests; boundary tests verifying forbidden imports.
architectureRule: platform-observability must NOT import OTEL SDK. Use platform-errors for expected failures; platform-logging instead of console.

responsibility: Browser-side shared libraries: ui-design-system (components + lib) and graphql-browser-client (TypedDocumentNode + TanStack Query helpers).
dependencyDirection: Depends on packages/contracts and packages/platform/errors. Imported by apps/web.
tests: Component tests (vitest); a11y assertions.
architectureRule: ui-design-system visual layer may be AI-regenerated; component contracts and accessibility semantics preserved (keep deprecated Checkbox/Radio/Switch single-component API per ADR-ACT-0290).

responsibility: Cloud infrastructure TypeScript modules (aws, cloudflare) — programmatic infra helpers, not Terraform HCL.
dependencyDirection: Leaf utility; depends on packages/contracts/platform only.
tests: Unit tests for config generation.
architectureRule: Never hardcode secrets; source via TF_VAR_*/env keys (secrets/env/tf policy).

responsibility: Build and developer tooling libraries: ci, codegen, docker, terraform.
dependencyDirection: Standalone; may depend on contracts. Not imported by product runtime.
tests: Unit tests for generators.
architectureRule: Tooling must not become a runtime dependency of apps.

responsibility: Test-only shared code: test-support (fixtures, builders, helpers) and dev-services (local stand-ins).
forbiddenContents: being imported by production runtime code paths
dependencyDirection: Depends on contracts/domain for typed fixtures. Imported only by tests and dev flows.
tests: Self-tests for builders.
architectureRule: Never imported by shipped runtime; fixture org ids must be valid v4 UUIDs (dev tenant model).

responsibility: Repository automation: architecture governance orchestrator + validators, coverage normalisation, e2e result contracts, feature scaffolder, quality gate, semgrep rules, platform-governor MCP.
dependencyDirection: Operates on the repo; not part of app dependency graph.
publicApi: Node CLI entrypoints invoked by Makefile.
tests: Self-tests (e.g. result-contract.test.mjs, scenario-manifest.test.mjs).
architectureRule: Architecture orchestrator enforces import boundaries, README generation, inventory, lifecycle evidence, slice readiness, i18n.

responsibility: Operational shell/node scripts invoked by the Makefile: confidence-ladder stages, compose validation, env-manifest generation, keycloak proofs, backup, sonar/sentry/smoke/preflight/evidence/tilt/clean.
dependencyDirection: Repo automation; not in app graph.
tests: Exercised by make check / make all stages.
architectureRule: run-stage.sh §9 runs Sonar exactly once in the test stage; never add Sonar to make check.

responsibility: Stage-aware Playwright suites and registries (internal, identity, external, discovery, prod, support) plus suite/scenario/persona registries and the semantic ui-contract.
dependencyDirection: Drives apps over HTTP/browser; no source import of app internals.
publicApi: Run via playwright.*.config.ts and make e2e targets.
tests: Self-validating via tools/e2e result-contract; gated by make all.
architectureRule: ADR-0075/ADR-ACT-0285: make all fails on coverage/auth/a11y/authz gaps. ui-contract.json anchors AI-regenerated UI behaviour. Dev e2e targets Caddy, not Vite.

responsibility: Auxiliary standalone services for local/test only (mock-oidc IdP).
dependencyDirection: Independent process; not imported by apps.
tests: Used by identity e2e suite.
architectureRule: Mock OIDC cannot substitute for real-IdP login-simulation proof (ADR-ACT-0220 remains blocked).

responsibility: Container build and service configuration, one directory per composed service, plus entrypoint and compose-wrapper scripts.
dependencyDirection: Consumed by compose.yaml/Tiltfile.
tests: npm run compose:config / compose:config:all; compose-port validator.
architectureRule: Every composed service with a GUI needs a clickthrough policy row + platform.clickthrough.<svc> permission (ADR-ACT-0233). WireMock is direct-port only.

responsibility: Terraform HCL: tf wrapper bin, reusable modules, and one canonical env directory per stage (dev/staging/prod/test).
dependencyDirection: Provisions cloud; not in app graph.
tests: tf validate/plan in CI.
architectureRule: One canonical name per stage. State files never committed. Secrets sourced via TF_VAR_* env, never hardcoded in committed tfvars.

responsibility: Non-secret stage configuration: common/shared base plus per-stage dev/test/staging/prod JSON.
dependencyDirection: Read by env-manifest generation (scripts/env) and runtime config loaders.
publicApi: Consumed by config-runtime and env registry.
tests: Validated by env registry/bootstrap (ADR-0072).
architectureRule: Manifests replace all hand-maintained env files; .env/ is generated, never committed.

responsibility: Makefile includes split by concern (core, compose, test, e2e, quality, env, stages, evidence, tools, clean, help).
dependencyDirection: Included by root Makefile; orchestrates scripts and tools.
publicApi: make targets (help, check, all, release-confidence, compose-up-*, etc.).
tests: Exercised by make check / make all.
architectureRule: make check stays fast (no Sonar). make all is the authoritative gate running Sonar exactly once (ADR-ACT-0290/0291).

responsibility: Governance and design source of truth: ADRs + ACTION-REGISTER, architecture rules, OpenAPI baseline, CODEMAPS, evidence bundles, patterns, schemas, security, slices, specs, local-development, v2-foundation.
forbiddenContents: marking ACTION-REGISTER rows Done without evidence
dependencyDirection: Documentation; governs all layers.
publicApi: docs/api/openapi.json is the REST baseline; docs/architecture/import-boundary-rules.json drives the boundary gate.
tests: adr-compliance, validate-action-register, openapi drift gate, markdownlint.
architectureRule: Every structural decision needs an ADR or ACTION-REGISTER update; authoritative next ADR/action numbers live in ACTION-REGISTER.md.
